title: Director Persona Cache Policy v1
description: Policy configuration for H.Director persona cache behavior: TTL, eviction, and telemetry thresholds.

policyId.description: Stable identifier for this cache policy.

ttlSeconds.description: Maximum age of a cache entry before forced eviction.

maxEntries.description: Maximum number of session entries retained in memory.

telemetrySampleRate.description: Fraction of cache events to log (1.0 = all, 0.1 = 10%).

revisionStampPolicy.description: Rules for tracking and comparing revision stamps.

consentVersionField.description: Canonical path to consent revision counter.

budgetVersionField.description: Canonical path to budget revision counter.

personaVersionField.description: Field used to detect persona contract updates.

invalidationTriggers.description: Events that must clear a cache entry.
